contentBlocks.original:
ॐ श्री आञ्जनेयाय नमः ।
ॐ महावीराय नमः ।
ॐ हनुमते नमः ।
ॐ मारुतात्मजाय नमः ।
ॐ तत्त्वज्ञानप्रदाय नमः ।
ॐ सीतादेवीमुद्राप्रदायकाय नमः ।
ॐ अशोकवनिकाच्छेत्रे नमः ।
ॐ सर्वमायाविभञ्जनाय नमः ।
ॐ सर्वबन्धविमोक्त्रे नमः ।
ॐ रक्षोविध्वंसकारकाय नमः । 10 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ śrī āñjanēyāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ mahāvīrāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ hanumatē namaḥ ।
ōṃ mārutātmajāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ tattvajñānapradāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sītādēvīmudrāpradāyakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ aśōkavanikāchChētrē namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvamāyāvibhañjanāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvabandhavimōktrē namaḥ ।
ōṃ rakṣōvidhvaṃsakārakāya namaḥ । 10 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Oṃ Āñjanēya (son of Añjanā), Mahāvīra (the great hero), Hanumat (Hanumān), Mārutātmaja (son of the Wind), Tattvajñānaprada (bestower of knowledge of truth), Sītādēvīmudrāpradāyaka (giver of Sītā Devī's signet ring), Aśōkavanikācchhetra (destroyer of the Aśoka grove), Sarvamāyāvibhañjana (dispeller of all illusions), Sarvabandhavimokta (liberator from all bondage), Rakṣōvidhvaṃsakāraka (destroyer of the demon race). (1–10)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ परविद्यापरीहाराय नमः ।
ॐ परशौर्यविनाशनाय नमः ।
ॐ परमन्त्रनिराकर्त्रे नमः ।
ॐ परयन्त्रप्रभेदकाय नमः ।
ॐ सर्वग्रहविनाशिने नमः ।
ॐ भीमसेनसहायकृते नमः ।
ॐ सर्वदुःखहराय नमः ।
ॐ सर्वलोकचारिणे नमः ।
ॐ मनोजवाय नमः ।
ॐ पारिजातद्रुमूलस्थाय नमः । 20 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ paravidyāparīhārāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ paraśauryavināśanāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ paramantranirākartrē namaḥ ।
ōṃ parayantraprabhēdakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvagrahavināśinē namaḥ ।
ōṃ bhīmasēnasahāyakṛtē namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvaduḥkhaharāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvalōkachāriṇē namaḥ ।
ōṃ manōjavāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ pārijātadrumūlasthāya namaḥ । 20 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Paravidyāparīhāra (remover of hostile magical knowledge), Paraśauryavināśana (destroyer of the enemy's valor), Paramantranirākartā (negator of hostile mantras), Parayantraprabhēdaka (piercer of hostile yantras), Sarvagrahavināśī (destroyer of all planetary afflictions), Bhīmasēnasahāyakṛt (helper of Bhīmasena), Sarvaduḥkhahara (remover of all sorrows), Sarvalōkacāriṇa (one who roams all the worlds), Manōjava (swift as thought), Pārijātadrumūlastha (standing at the root of the Pārijāta tree). (11–20)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ सर्वमन्त्रस्वरूपवते नमः ।
ॐ सर्वतन्त्रस्वरूपिणे नमः ।
ॐ सर्वयन्त्रात्मकाय नमः ।
ॐ कपीश्वराय नमः ।
ॐ महाकायाय नमः ।
ॐ सर्वरोगहराय नमः ।
ॐ प्रभवे नमः ।
ॐ बलसिद्धिकराय नमः ।
ॐ सर्वविद्यासम्पत्प्रदायकाय नमः ।
ॐ कपिसेनानायकाय नमः । 30 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ sarvamantrasvarūpavatē namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvatantrasvarūpiṇē namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvayantrātmakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ kapīśvarāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ mahākāyāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvarōgaharāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ prabhavē namaḥ ।
ōṃ balasiddhikarāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sarvavidyāsampatpradāyakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ kapisēnānāyakāya namaḥ । 30 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Sarvamantrasvarūpavat (embodiment of all mantras), Sarvatantrasvarūpiṇa (form of all tantras), Sarvayantrātmaka (essence of all yantras), Kapīśvara (lord of monkeys), Mahākāya (of great body), Sarvarōgahara (remover of all diseases), Prabhu (the Lord), Balasiddhikara (bestower of strength and accomplishment), Sarvavidyāsampatpradāyaka (giver of all learning and wealth), Kapisēnānāyaka (leader of the monkey army). (21–30)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ भविष्यच्चतुराननाय नमः ।
ॐ कुमारब्रह्मचारिणे नमः ।
ॐ रत्नकुण्डलदीप्तिमते नमः ।
ॐ सञ्चलद्वालसन्नद्धलम्बमानशिखोज्ज्वलाय नमः ।
ॐ गन्धर्वविद्यातत्त्वज्ञाय नमः ।
ॐ महाबलपराक्रमाय नमः ।
ॐ कारागृहविमोक्त्रे नमः ।
ॐ शृङ्खलाबन्धमोचकाय नमः ।
ॐ सागरोत्तारकाय नमः ।
ॐ प्राज्ञाय नमः । 40 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ bhaviṣyachchaturānanāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ kumārabrahmachāriṇē namaḥ ।
ōṃ ratnakuṇḍaladīptimatē namaḥ ।
ōṃ sañchaladvālasannaddhalambamānaśikhōjjvalāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ gandharvavidyātattvajñāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ mahābalaparākramāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ kārāgṛhavimōktrē namaḥ ।
ōṃ śṛṅkhalābandhamōchakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sāgarōttārakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ prājñāya namaḥ । 40 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Bhaviṣyachchaturānana (the future four-faced Brahmā), Kumārabrahmacāriṇa (the youthful celibate), Ratnakuṇḍaladīptimant (shining with jeweled earrings), Sañchaladvālasannaddhalambamānaśikhōjjvala (blazing with a flowing, braided and hanging tuft of hair), Gandharvavidyātattvajña (knower of the essence of Gandharva lore), Mahābalaparākrama (of great strength and valor), Kārāgṛhavimokta (liberator from prison), Śṛṅkhalābandhamōcaka (releaser from chain bondage), Sāgarōttāraka (the one who crossed the ocean), Prājña (the wise). (31–40)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ रामदूताय नमः ।
ॐ प्रतापवते नमः ।
ॐ वानराय नमः ।
ॐ केसरीसुताय नमः ।
ॐ सीताशोकनिवारकाय नमः ।
ॐ अञ्जनागर्भसम्भूताय नमः ।
ॐ बालार्कसदृशाननाय नमः ।
ॐ विभीषणप्रियकराय नमः ।
ॐ दशग्रीवकुलान्तकाय नमः ।
ॐ लक्ष्मणप्राणदात्रे नमः । 50 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ rāmadūtāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ pratāpavatē namaḥ ।
ōṃ vānarāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ kēsarīsutāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sītāśōkanivārakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ añjanāgarbhasambhūtāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ bālārkasadṛśānanāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ vibhīṣaṇapriyakarāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ daśagrīvakulāntakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ lakṣmaṇaprāṇadātrē namaḥ । 50 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Rāmadūta (messenger of Rāma), Pratāpavant (possessed of great valor), Vānara (the monkey), Kēsarīsuta (son of Kēsarī), Sītāśōkanivāraka (remover of Sītā's grief), Añjanāgarbhasambhūta (born from Añjanā's womb), Bālārkasadṛśānana (face like the rising sun), Vibhīṣaṇapriyakara (beloved of Vibhīṣaṇa), Daśagrīvakulāntaka (destroyer of Rāvaṇa's lineage), Lakṣmaṇaprāṇadātā (giver of life to Lakṣmaṇa). (41–50)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ वज्रकायाय नमः ।
ॐ महाद्युतये नमः ।
ॐ चिरञ्जीविने नमः ।
ॐ रामभक्ताय नमः ।
ॐ दैत्यकार्यविघातकाय नमः ।
ॐ अक्षहन्त्रे नमः ।
ॐ काञ्चनाभाय नमः ।
ॐ पञ्चवक्त्राय नमः ।
ॐ महातपसे नमः ।
ॐ लङ्किणीभञ्जनाय नमः । 60 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ vajrakāyāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ mahādyutayē namaḥ ।
ōṃ chirañjīvinē namaḥ ।
ōṃ rāmabhaktāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ daityakāryavighātakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ akṣahantrē namaḥ ।
ōṃ kāñchanābhāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ pañchavaktrāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ mahātapasē namaḥ ।
ōṃ laṅkiṇībhañjanāya namaḥ । 60 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Vajrakāya (of diamond body), Mahādyuti (of great splendor), Chirañjīvī (the immortal), Rāmabhakta (devotee of Rāma), Daityakāryavighātaka (obstructor of the demons' plans), Akṣahantā (slayer of Akṣa), Kāñcanābha (of golden luster), Pañcavaktra (the five-faced), Mahātapas (of great austerity), Laṅkiṇībhañjana (vanquisher of Laṅkiṇī). (51–60)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ श्रीमते नमः ।
ॐ सिंहिकाप्राणभञ्जनाय नमः ।
ॐ गन्धमादनशैलस्थाय नमः ।
ॐ लङ्कापुरविदाहकाय नमः ।
ॐ सुग्रीवसचिवाय नमः ।
ॐ धीराय नमः ।
ॐ शूराय नमः ।
ॐ दैत्यकुलान्तकाय नमः ।
ॐ सुरार्चिताय नमः ।
ॐ महातेजसे नमः । 70 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ śrīmatē namaḥ ।
ōṃ siṃhikāprāṇabhañjanāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ gandhamādanaśailasthāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ laṅkāpuravidāhakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sugrīvasachivāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ dhīrāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ śūrāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ daityakulāntakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ surārchitāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ mahātējasē namaḥ । 70 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Śrīmant (the glorious), Siṃhikāprāṇabhañjana (destroyer of Siṃhikā's life), Gandhamādanaśailastha (dweller on the Gandhamādana mountain), Laṅkāpuravidāhaka (burner of the city of Laṅkā), Sugrīvasaciva (minister of Sugrīva), Dhīra (the steadfast), Śūra (the brave), Daityakulāntaka (destroyer of the demon lineage), Surārcita (worshipped by the gods), Mahātejass (of immense radiance). (61–70)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ रामचूडामणिप्रदाय नमः ।
ॐ कामरूपिणे नमः ।
ॐ पिङ्गलाक्षाय नमः ।
ॐ वार्धिमैनाकपूजिताय नमः ।
ॐ कबलीकृतमार्ताण्डमण्डलाय नमः ।
ॐ विजितेन्द्रियाय नमः ।
ॐ रामसुग्रीवसन्धात्रे नमः ।
ॐ महिरावणमर्दनाय नमः ।
ॐ स्फटिकाभाय नमः ।
ॐ वागधीशाय नमः । 80 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ rāmachūḍāmaṇipradāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ kāmarūpiṇē namaḥ ।
ōṃ piṅgaḻākṣāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ vārdhimainākapūjitāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ kabaḻīkṛtamārtāṇḍamaṇḍalāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ vijitēndriyāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ rāmasugrīvasandhātrē namaḥ ।
ōṃ mahirāvaṇamardanāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sphaṭikābhāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ vāgadhīśāya namaḥ । 80 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Rāmacūḍāmaṇiprada (deliverer of Rāma's crest-jewel to Sītā), Kāmarūpiṇa (one who can assume any form at will), Piṅgalākṣa (tawny-eyed), Vārdhimainākapūjita (worshipped by Maināka in the ocean), Kabalīkṛtamārtāṇḍamaṇḍala (one who swallowed the orb of the Sun), Vijitēndriya (conqueror of the senses), Rāmasugrīvasandhātā (mediator who united Rāma and Sugrīva), Mahirāvaṇamardana (crusher of Mahirāvaṇa), Sphaṭikābha (crystal-bright), Vāgadhīśa (lord of speech). (71–80)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ नवव्याकृतिपण्डिताय नमः ।
ॐ चतुर्बाहवे नमः ।
ॐ दीनबन्धवे नमः ।
ॐ महात्मने नमः ।
ॐ भक्तवत्सलाय नमः ।
ॐ सञ्जीवननगाहर्त्रे नमः ।
ॐ शुचये नमः ।
ॐ वाग्मिने नमः ।
ॐ दृढव्रताय नमः ।
ॐ कालनेमिप्रमथनाय नमः । 90 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ navavyākṛtipaṇḍitāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ chaturbāhavē namaḥ ।
ōṃ dīnabandhavē namaḥ ।
ōṃ mahātmanē namaḥ ।
ōṃ bhaktavatsalāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sañjīvananagāhartrē namaḥ ।
ōṃ śuchayē namaḥ ।
ōṃ vāgminē namaḥ ।
ōṃ dṛḍhavratāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ kālanēmipramathanāya namaḥ । 90 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Navavyākṛtipaṇḍita (scholar of the nine grammatical treatises), Caturbāhu (four-armed), Dīnabandhu (friend of the destitute), Mahātman (the great-souled), Bhaktavatsala (tender toward devotees), Sañjīvananagāhartā (bringer of the Sañjīvanī mountain), Śuci (the pure), Vāgmī (the eloquent), Dṛḍhavrata (of firm vows), Kālanēmipramathana (destroyer of the demon Kālanemi). (81–90)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ हरिमर्कटमर्कटाय नमः ।
ॐ दान्ताय नमः ।
ॐ शान्ताय नमः ।
ॐ प्रसन्नात्मने नमः ।
ॐ शतकण्ठमदापहृते नमः ।
ॐ योगिने नमः ।
ॐ रामकथालोलाय नमः ।
ॐ सीतान्वेषणपण्डिताय नमः ।
ॐ वज्रदंष्ट्राय नमः ।
ॐ वज्रनखाय नमः । 100 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ harimarkaṭamarkaṭāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ dāntāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ śāntāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ prasannātmanē namaḥ ।
ōṃ śatakaṇṭhamadāpahṛtē namaḥ ।
ōṃ yōginē namaḥ ।
ōṃ rāmakathālōlāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sītānvēṣaṇapaṇḍitāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ vajradaṃṣṭrāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ vajranakhāya namaḥ । 100 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Harimarkaṭamarkaṭa (the divine monkey among Hari's monkey devotees), Dānta (the self-restrained), Śānta (the serene), Prasannātman (of joyful soul), Śatakaṇṭhamadāpahṛt (remover of the pride of the hundred-necked Rāvaṇa), Yogī (the yogi), Rāmakathālōla (delighting in Rāma's story), Sītānveṣaṇapaṇḍita (expert in finding Sītā), Vajradaṃṣṭra (of thunderbolt teeth), Vajranakha (of thunderbolt claws). (91–100)

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ रुद्रवीर्यसमुद्भवाय नमः ।
ॐ इन्द्रजित्प्रहितामोघब्रह्मास्त्रविनिवारकाय नमः ।
ॐ पार्थध्वजाग्रसंवासिने नमः ।
ॐ शरपञ्जरभेदकाय नमः ।
ॐ दशबाहवे नमः ।
ॐ लोकपूज्याय नमः ।
ॐ जाम्बवत्प्रीतिवर्धनाय नमः ।
ॐ सीतासमेतश्रीरामपादसेवाधुरन्धराय नमः । 108 ।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ rudravīryasamudbhavāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ indrajitprahitāmōghabrahmāstravinivārakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ pārthadhvajāgrasaṃvāsinē namaḥ ।
ōṃ śarapañjarabhēdakāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ daśabāhavē namaḥ ।
ōṃ lōkapūjyāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ jāmbavatprītivardhanāya namaḥ ।
ōṃ sītāsamētaśrīrāmapādasēvādhurandharāya namaḥ । 108 ।
contentBlocks.translation: Rudravīryasamudbhava (born of Rudra's valor), Indrajitprahitāmōghabrahmāstravinivāraka (repeller of the infallible Brahmāstra hurled by Indrajit), Pārthadhvajāgrasaṃvāsī (dwelling at the top of Arjuna's battle-flag), Śarapañjarabhēdaka (piercer of the cage of arrows), Daśabāhu (ten-armed), Lōkapūjya (worshipped by all the worlds), Jāmbavatprītivardha (increaser of Jāmbavat's joy), Sītāsamētaśrīrāmapādasēvādhurandhara (chief bearer of the duty of serving Śrī Rāma's lotus feet together with Sītā). (101–108)
